title: Joining new team
excerpt:
I was added to a workplace/team, but I moved teams within the same company. 
Is there a way to clear my Monday so I can start my own team/workplace?

posts.author: Allisonnam (Allison Nam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was added to a workplace/team, but I moved teams within the same company.
Is there a way to clear my Monday so I can start my own team/workplace?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Allisonnam I would recommend writing in to support@monday.com about this! We can help you figure out a solution for your particular solution there

In the meantime, what would you think about simply creating a new workspace (via the lefthand pane) and team (via your avatar menu), and keeping the old information you have?
